schedule.description: Story 1 — McIlroy historic lead, Moving Day
Story 1 — Bold take on McIlroy's dominance
Story 4 — DeChambeau misses cut, LIV shrinks
Story 5 — Coughlin wins Aramco by five

stories.title: McIlroy's Historic 36-Hole Lead — Masters Moving Day Is Here

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
RORY McLROY: -12. Six shots clear. Round 2: 65.

He now holds the LARGEST 36-hole lead in Masters history. Three shots better than any defending champion at this point.

Moving Day starts at 2:50 PM ET. This is historic. #TheMasters #GolfFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Nine birdies. Two bogeys. 65.

Rory McIlroy's Round 2 at Augusta National was the low round of the day — and it tied Jack Nicklaus for most career Masters rounds of 65 or better.

You're watching something special. #TheMasters #GolfFanrecap

article.headline: McIlroy at -12: Historic 36-Hole Masters Lead Sets Stage for Moving Day Coronation

stories.title: Burns and Reed Chase McIlroy — Six Back Heading Into Saturday

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Masters leaderboard entering Moving Day:

-12: McIlroy (6 clear)
-6: Burns, Reed (T2)
-5: Fleetwood, Lowry, Rose (T5)

Final group: McIlroy + Burns, 2:50 PM ET. Burns' biggest stage. #TheMasters #GolfFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Sam Burns plays in the FINAL GROUP at Augusta National today.

Six shots back. In the same pairing as the defending champion who just broke the 36-hole record.

This is the biggest round of Burns' career. #TheMasters #GolfFanrecap

article.headline: Burns, Reed, and Europe's Best in Pursuit — Who Can Chase Down McIlroy at Augusta?

stories.title: Scheffler's Title Defense Fading — Outside Top 20 at Augusta

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler — World No. 1, two-time Masters champion — is outside the top 20.

He failed to break par in Round 2 for just the 3rd time in 24 Augusta rounds. Seven shots back.

The defending champion is running away from everyone. #TheMasters #GolfFanrecap

stories.title: DeChambeau Misses Masters Cut — LIV Golf's Augusta Presence Shrinks

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Bryson DeChambeau missed the Masters cut — 6 over par.

Only 10 LIV Golf players made the 2026 Augusta field. That's down from 18 at the circuit's peak.

Golf's power shift is playing out at Augusta National. #TheMasters #GolfFanrecap

stories.title: LPGA — Lauren Coughlin Wins Aramco Championship by Five

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Lauren Coughlin won the LPGA Aramco Championship by FIVE shots.

-7 total. $600,000 payday. Shadow Creek, Las Vegas.

She beat Nelly Korda and the entire field in convincing fashion. Coughlin is one to watch. #LPGA #GolfFanrecap

stories.title: Masters Sunday Preview — Can Anyone Catch Rory?

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Sunday at Augusta National:

McIlroy leads by 6. Burns and Reed are chasing. Scheffler needs a miracle.

The largest 36-hole lead in Masters history is hard to blow. But stranger things have happened at Augusta. #TheMasters #GolfFanrecap

stories.title: LPGA Ford Championship Preview — $3.75M Purse, April 16-19

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
LPGA action continues next week.

The Ford Championship — April 16-19 at El Caballero CC, Tarzana, CA — offers a $3.75M purse.

Nelly Korda was runner-up at the Aramco Championship. She'll be looking to bounce back. #LPGA #GolfFanrecap
